title: praravinia microphylla
intro: Praravinia microphylla, also known as the Indian pennywort, is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Praravinia microphylla include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Praravinia microphylla include teas, capsules, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and insomnia.
